@coachcoriclose this is exactly what I teach in my goal setting matrix session with athletes! And how this builds character and how you you’re paying your future self every time you follow through on actions in alignment with values. Would love to connect. I also have a group session that shows how we default under pressure to “survival mode” unless we have clear values and actions.

As a former player decades ago, I must admit I was one of those play hardest when the “lights were on” kind of players and I hate that about myself back then. 
I’m not like that now but I was then.  It might explain why I only played for a small college and not D1.  I was not elite, it’s as simple as that.
